query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count!"
           FROM documents d
           WHERE d.course_id = $1
             AND d.classified_at IS NOT NULL
             AND NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM linker_decisions ld
                 WHERE ld.course_id = $1
                   AND (ld.a_doc_id = d.id OR ld.b_doc_id = d.id)
             )
